### 已知（dp,e,n,c） dp=d%(p-1)

eg：
```python
e = 65537
n = 
dp = 905074498052346904643025132879518330691925174573054004621877253318682675055421970943552016695528560364834446303196939207056642927148093290374440210503657
c = 
```
exp:
```python
import gmpy2
import libnum
e = 65537
n = 
dp = 905074498052346904643025132879518330691925174573054004621877253318682675055421970943552016695528560364834446303196939207056642927148093290374440210503657
c = 

for i in range(1,65538):
    if (dp*e-1)%i == 0:
        if n%(((dp*e-1)/i)+1)==0:
            p=((dp*e-1)/i)+1
            q=n/(((dp*e-1)/i)+1)
            phi = (p-1)*(q-1)
            d = gmpy2.invert(e,phi)%phi
            print libnum.n2s(pow(c,d,n))
```
```
flag{wow_leaking_dp_breaks_rsa?_98924743502}
```
### 已知(dp,dq,q,p,c)
eg:
```python
dp= 
dq= 
p= 
q= 
c= 
```
exp：
```python
def decrypt(dp,dq,p,q,c):
    InvQ = gmpy2.invert(q, p)
    mp = pow(c, dp, p)
    mq = pow(c, dq, q)
    m = (((mp-mq)*InvQ) % p)*q+mq
    print libnum.n2s(m)

dp= 
dq= 
p= 
q= 
c= 
decrypt(dp,dq,p,q,c)
```
```
flag{dp_dq_is_very_dangerous!_47325684736584}
```
### 共模攻击

eg:
```python


e1=11187289

e2=9647291
```
exp:
```python
#-*-coding:utf-8 -*-
from gmpy2 import *
import libnum


e1=11187289
e2=9647291
s = gcdext(e1, e2) #e1*s1+e2*s2 = 1
s1 =  s[1]
s2 = -s[2]



c2 = invert(c2, n) 
'''
我们知道解出来s2是负数。
而在数论模运算中，要求一个数的负数次幂，与常规方法并不一样。
比如此处要求c2的s2次幂，就要先计算c2的模反元素c2'，然后求c2'的s2次幂。
'''
m = (pow(c1,s1,n) * pow(c2 , s2 , n)) % n   # m=(c1^s1*c2^s2)%n
print libnum.n2s(m)
```
```
flag{49d91077a1abcb14f1a9d546c80be9ef}
```
[RSA 共模攻击 Isc2016——PhrackCTF](https://www.jianshu.com/p/9b44512d898f)
